title: The Church and the Homosexual
author: John J. McNeill
targetAudience: Individuals exploring the intersection of faith and sexual orientation, LGBTQ+ community members, religious leaders, and scholars.
relatedBooks: Queer Theology: Rethinking the Western Body
God and the Gay Christian: The Biblical Case in Support of Same-Sex Relationships
The Gay Christian: A Guide for the LGBTQ+ Community
keyInsights: Challenges traditional church teachings on homosexuality.
Promotes dialogue between LGBTQ+ individuals and religious institutions.
Encourages understanding and acceptance within faith communities.
